title: SPL Token Metadata
description: Call `GET /v1/solana-mainnet/tokens/{mint}/` with any SPL token mint address to retrieve: token name, symbol, decimals, total supply, logo URI, and current USD price as indexed by GoldRush. Works for any SPL token including newly launched pump.fun tokens, wrapped assets, and DeFi governance tokens. This is the mandatory first call for any Solana token analytics page — gives your app complete token context from a single endpoint.
useCase: Build a Solana token analytics page that loads complete token context — name, symbol, supply, logo, and current price — from a single GoldRush endpoint call.

keyParams.contractAddresses: The SPL token mint address to fetch metadata and current price for
keyParams.tokenAddress: The SPL token mint address to fetch holder count and total supply for
keyParams.page_size: Set to 1 to efficiently retrieve metadata alongside total holder count
